zh.lifeSummary: 當Filia Bromley於1240年出生在英國斯塔福爾布羅姆利時，她的父親John de Bromley25歲，母親Mary McCormick25歲。她於大約1264年與Sir John Bradshaigh在英國藍卡爾黑格結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1300年在法國阿奎泰洛吉吉加洛享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Filia Bromley于1240年出生在英国斯塔福爾布羅姆利时，她的父亲John de Bromley25岁，母亲Mary McCormick25岁。她于大约1264年与Sir John Bradshaigh在英国藍卡爾黑格结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1300年在法国阿奎泰洛吉吉加洛享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bromley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places called Bromley, in Essex, Hertfordshire, Kent (now in Greater London), Greater London, Greater Manchester, Staffordshire, Shropshire, and elsewhere. Most are named with Old English brōm ‘broom’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’, but Bromley (near Bow) in Greater London is from Old English bræmbel ‘bramble’ + lēah.

variants.name: Brimley
meanings: habitational name, perhaps from Brimley in Devon or Brimbley in Stoke Abbott, Dorset, both named with Old English brōm ‘broom’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

variants.name: Brumley
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Bromley  . This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Filia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Philip
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Filia Bromley was born in 1240, in Bromley, Staffordshire, England, her father, John de Bromley, was 25 and her mother, Mary McCormick, was 25. She married Sir John Bradshaigh about 1264, in Haigh, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1300, in Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, France, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Filia Bromley est née en 1240, à Bromley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Bromley, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mary McCormick, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Bradshaigh environ 1264, à Haigh, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1300, à Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Filia Bromley 1240 in Bromley, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Bromley 25 und ihre Mutter Mary McCormick 25. Sie hat um 1264 in Haigh, Lancashire, England Sir John Bradshaigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1300 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Filia Bromley è nata il nel 1240 nel Bromley, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, John de Bromley, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Mary McCormick, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Bradshaigh circa 1264, nel Haigh, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1300, nel Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Filia Bromleyが1240年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアブロムリーで生まれた時，父John de Bromleyは25歳，母Mary McCormickは25歳であった。約1264年にイギリスランカシュアイアヘイグでSir John Bradshaighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1300年にフランスアクイティアインロト-エト-ガーオンで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Filia Bromley(이)가 1240년 영국 스태퍼드실르 브롬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Bromley(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary McCormick(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1264년 영국 랭카실르 하이에서 Sir John Bradshaigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 프랑스 아키테인 로트-트-가니에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Filia Bromley nasceu em 1240, em Bromley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Bromley, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mary McCormick, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Bradshaigh aproximadamente 1264, em Haigh, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1300, em Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, França, com 60 anos.

ro.Haigh, Greater Manchester, England: Haigh, Greater Manchester, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Filia Bromley родилась в 1240 г. в местности бромли, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Bromley было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary McCormick, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Bradshaigh около 1264 г. в местности хеиг, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1300 г. в местности лот-ет-гаронн, аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 60 лет.
